---
name: Template project
about: Report something broken
title: "PROJECT: [Your title here]"
labels: project
assignees: ""
---

## Project Leader(s)

**Name(s):** [Your name(s) here] 

**Emails(s):** [Your email(s) here]

## Project Description

Provide a concise summary of the project. 
Include the main objective, the context or background information, and the significance of the project.

## Skills, knowledge and opportunities to learn
List the skills and knowledge that will be involved in the project. 
Be specific about technical expertise, programming languages, or other relevant qualifications. 
Try to also consider non-technical roles and skills. 
(Remember, the hackathon is inclusive, and those without these specific skills are still encouraged to participate and can contribute in various ways.)

## Resources

Identify the resources relevant to the project. This can include:

* Libraries/Software: List any specific libraries or software tools that will be used.

* Data: Mention any datasets that will be used, including where they can be accessed if applicable.

* Hardware: Specify any particular hardware requirements.

## Tasks and breakdown of roles
Try to identify some of the tasks that will be involved in your project. 

[First Task]:
Goal: Describe the goal of this task.
Steps: Outline the actions needed to accomplish this task.

[Second Task]:
Goal: Describe the goal of this task.
Steps: Outline the actions needed to accomplish this task.

## Any other information

Add any additional information that you would like participants to know.
